# Pubky Documentation

> Pubky is an open protocol for key-based, censorship-resistant web applications. It provides identity via public keys, data storage on homeservers, and discovery via the Mainline DHT — all over simple HTTP/REST APIs.
>
> For the complete documentation, see: https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/llms-full.txt

## Quick Start

- [TL;DR](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/tldr/): 30-second overview of Pubky — key-based identity, user-chosen homeservers, censorship resistance, no blockchain
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/getting-started/): Complete guide for users and developers to start using Pubky
- [Overview](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/overview/): Welcome to the Pubky Knowledge Base — what Pubky is and how the docs are organized
- [The Vision of Pubky](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/the-vision-of-pubky/): Decentralizing our future — replacing Big Tech, Big State, and Big Banks with user-first infrastructure
- [Glossary](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/glossary/): Quick reference for terms used throughout the Pubky ecosystem
- [FAQ](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/faq/): 63+ frequently asked questions about Pubky Core, identity, homeservers, and more

## Architecture & Comparisons

- [Architecture Overview](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/architecture/): How identity, discovery, storage, and application layers work together
- [Comparisons](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/comparisons/): How Pubky differs from Nostr, Bluesky, Farcaster, IPFS, blockchains, and pure P2P

## Key Concepts

- [Censorship](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/censorship/): Why censorship is inevitable on centralized platforms and how Pubky resists it
- [Credible Exit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/credible-exit/): The ability to leave a platform without losing data, identity, or connections
- [Semantic Social Graph](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/concepts/semantic-social-graph/): Tagged relationships, weighted connections, and user-centric personalization for decentralized social networks

## Pubky Core

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/introduction/): Open protocol combining PKARR with conventional web technologies for censorship-resistant apps
- [API Reference](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/api/): Complete RESTful HTTP API specification for storing and retrieving data on homeservers
- [Authentication](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/authentication/): Decentralized authentication using cryptographic keys, capabilities, and signed AuthTokens
- [Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/homeserver/): Independent data stores that users choose or self-host, accessible via HTTP key-value API
- [SDK](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/sdk/): Client libraries for Rust, JavaScript/TypeScript, React Native, Swift, and Kotlin
- [Security Model](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/security-model/): Threat landscape, trust assumptions, and credible exit guarantees
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/eli5/): Explaining Pubky Core like you're 5 years old

## PKARR

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/introduction/): Public Key Addressable Resource Records — self-issued public keys as sovereign domains
- [Why PKARR?](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/why-pkarr/): Motivation behind PKARR — distributed discovery, semantics, and databases
- [Architecture](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/architecture/): Components, SignedPacket format, clients, relays, and DHT interaction
- [Getting Started](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/getting-started/): How to publish and resolve resource records using PKARR
- [Expectations](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/expectations/): Limitations — not a storage platform or real-time medium; caching and propagation behavior
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubkycore/pkarr/eli5/): Explaining PKARR and Mainline DHT like you're 5 years old

## Pubky Apps

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/introduction/): Pubky App — decentralized social media application and reference implementation on Pubky Core
- [App Specs](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-specs/): Shared data model specifications (schemas, validation, serialization) for the social app ecosystem
- [ELI5](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/eli5/): Explaining Pubky App like you're 5 years old

## App Architectures

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/introduction/): Overview of architectural patterns for apps built on Pubky Core
- [Client-Homeserver](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/client-homeserver/): Direct communication pattern for simple apps like bookmarks and file sync
- [Custom Backend](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/custom-backend/): Middleware layer with indexers and aggregators for advanced data processing
- [Global Aggregators](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/app-architectures/global-aggregators/): Centralized event processing from multiple homeservers for social feeds and search

## Indexing & Aggregation

- [Introduction](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/introduction/): Backend components — aggregators collect data, indexers normalize it, web servers serve it
- [Aggregator](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/aggregator/): Specialized reducers that filter and control data flow from homeservers
- [Indexer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/indexer/): Normalizes and transforms aggregated data into a unified searchable view
- [Pubky Nexus](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/pubky-nexus/): Production-grade indexing and aggregation service powering Pubky App social features
- [Web Server](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/indexing-and-aggregation/web-server/): Backend services for feeds, search, identity, and payments

## Reference App

- [Pubky Client](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/introduction/): User-facing PWA for interacting with the Pubky social network
- [pubky.app](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/pubky-app/): Flagship Next.js social media web app — local-first architecture, tech stack, and codebase structure
- [Bookmarks](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/bookmarks/): Privately save posts for later reference
- [Layouts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/layouts/): Customizable column, grid, and list UI layouts for feeds
- [Notifications](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/notifications/): Alerts for mentions, replies, reposts, follows, and quote posts
- [Perspectives](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/perspectives/): Custom-filtered views saved as templates of tags, weights, users, and reach
- [Posts](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/posts/): Core content — text, media, tags, mentions, links; supports reposts and replies
- [Profiles](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/profiles/): User identity pages with public key handle, bio, posts, followers, and following
- [Search](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/search/): Limited traditional search alongside tag-based and filter-based sorting
- [Tags](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/tags/): Free-text labels anyone can assign to users or posts — core building block of the Semantic Social Graph
- [Trends](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/pubky-apps/reference-app/features/trends/): Statistical views and leaderboards of trending posts, tags, and users

## Technologies

- [Cryptographic Key Pairs](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/key-pair/): Ed25519 public/private key pairs used for identity, signing, and encryption
- [Distributed Hash Table](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dht/): Decentralized key-value store for efficient data retrieval without central servers
- [Mainline DHT](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/mainline-dht/): BitTorrent's Kademlia-based DHT with 10M+ nodes — foundation for PKARR discovery
- [Domain Name System](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/dns/): How traditional DNS works and its role in the context of PKARR
- [DNS over HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/doh/): Encrypted DNS queries for secure resolution of public-key addresses
- [HTTPS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/https/): Encrypted HTTP communication using TLS for secure data transmission
- [PKDNS](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pkdns/): DNS server resolving PKARR public-key domains via the Mainline DHT
- [Homegate](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/homegate/): Homeserver signup gatekeeping via SMS verification or Lightning payments
- [HTTP Relay](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/http-relay/): Relay service for forwarding encrypted AuthTokens during authentication flows
- [Pubky Ring](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-ring/): Mobile identity manager (iOS/Android) for key generation, app authorization, and session management
- [Pubky CLI](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-cli/): Command-line tool for homeserver interaction, admin operations, and automation
- [Pubky Docker](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-docker/): Docker Compose orchestration for running the complete Pubky stack locally
- [Pubky Explorer](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-explorer/): Web-based file browser for exploring public data stored on homeservers
- [Pubky Backup](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-backup/): Desktop backup application for maintaining local copies of published homeserver data
- [Pubky Moderation](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-moderation/): Content moderation service — per-homeserver, operator-chosen, replaceable
- [Pubky Noise](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/pubky-noise/): Encrypted communication protocol based on the Noise Protocol Framework (WIP)
- [Paykit](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/paykit/): Decentralized payment protocol for discovery and coordination across Bitcoin and Lightning (WIP)
- [Jeb](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/explore/technologies/jeb-pubky-ai-bot/): AI-powered bot for the Pubky network — summaries, fact-checking, and intelligent responses

## Community

- [Contributing](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/contributing/): How to contribute to Pubky — docs, code, community support, and development setup
- [Troubleshooting](https://pubky-knowledge-base-starlight.vercel.app/troubleshooting/): Common issues and solutions for PKARR, homeservers, Docker, and more
